Ultra-Luxury Curation

Unrivaled Experiences, Curated for the Discerning.

01 Gastronomy

Michelin-Star Excellence, Privately Hosted.

Access the inaccessible. From private tables in the world's most exclusive kitchens to personal dinners prepared by legendary Michelin-star chefs at your estate.

  • restaurantchef&apos;s Table Confidential
  • restaurantRare Vintage Tastings

Mediterranean Horizons

Charter the world's most prestigious vessels. From the Amalfi Coast to the Balearics, our fleet is your private sanctuary on the water.

Superyacht Serenity

View Fleet
03 Expeditions

Beyond the Boundaries of Ordinary.

Private Aerial

Alpine Ridge Helicopter Tour

Unprecedented access to the peaks of the Swiss Alps with private summit picnics.

Cultural Access

After-Hours Louvre Curatorial

Explore the world&apos;s greatest art in absolute solitude with a leading historian.

Nature Reclaimed

Atacama Stargazing Expedition

A journey to the edge of the world with astrophysicists in a luxury desert outpost.

04 Restoration

The Art of Stillness.

Bespoke wellness retreats in the world's most tranquil locations. Tailored bio-hacking, traditional therapies, and absolute privacy.

Begin Your Bespoke Journey.

Our lifestyle managers are standing by to curate your next unrivaled experience. Every detail, managed to perfection.

AI-Powered, Human-Perfected

Your Personal Concierge,
Always On.

The Opulent Vault AI Concierge anticipates your needs before you even voice them. From property recommendations and private jet charters to bespoke experiences and 24/7 booking support — intelligence at your fingertips, luxury at every step.

  • check_smallInstant property recommendations tailored to your taste
  • check_smallPrivate aviation and helicopter transfer requests
  • check_smallCurated dining, spa, and experience bookings
  • check_smallRound-the-clock concierge and booking support
auto_awesome

OPV AI Concierge

Online

“Good evening. I have a preference for high-floor penthouses with panoramic city views in London this weekend. Can you arrange a private transfer from Heathrow as well?”

Certainly. I've identified three exceptional penthouses available this weekend — The Shard Residence, One Hyde Park, and The OPV Mayfair Suite. I've also reserved a Rolls-Royce Phantom for your Heathrow collection at 18:30. Shall I proceed?

Opulent Vault is Manchester's curated luxury lifestyle concierge marketplace.
